title: Spookify Halloween
body:
This mod adds various new decorations for Halloween and you can decorate houses and other buildings with it

Later, new buildings, decorations, building blocks, game mechanics, decoration functionality, and more will probably be added

(_The mod requires the [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/4407241) mod to work_)


















The mod is in the early stages of development. Over time, it will be updated and new decorations and functionality will be added
